title: "ORDER BY random()" gets optimized out
poc: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b DEFAULT 1);
CREATE TABLE t2(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY);
SELECT * FROM t1, t2 WHERE x=1 ORDER BY random();
key_bug_features: ORDER BY clause ignored in specific query execution
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b TEXT DEFAULT 'default');
CREATE TABLE t2(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, y REAL);
SELECT * FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.a = t2.x WHERE t2.y IS NOT NULL ORDER BY random();
